inputs.label: Revenue
inputs.businessContext: Total revenue from sales or services

inputs.label: Operating Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Total operating expenses including depreciation and amortization

inputs.label: Depreciation & Amortization
inputs.businessContext: Non-cash depreciation and amortization expense included in operating expenses

inputs.label: Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Corporate tax rate as a decimal (e.g., 0.20 for 20%)

inputs.label: Capital Expenditures (CapEx)
inputs.businessContext: Investment in fixed assets such as property, plant, and equipment

inputs.label: Change in Working Capital
inputs.businessContext: Increase in net working capital (current assets minus current liabilities)
